response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and his professional C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work — raising concerns about readiness for the role's core technical demands.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Strong background in distributed systems, CI/CD, and low-latency application design
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, tiling, or geospatial data pipelines
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required C++ core stack
Limited evidence of distributed systems expertise in fault tolerance or consistency at scale
